_note: One-off recording for u1 sources Extension #2 (FD L6.6, R14). Tests must NOT re-fetch — they replay this body via httpx.MockTransport. Re-record only when the live feed structure changes; document the change in aidlc-docs/audit.md. SEC EDGAR returns 403 without a fair-access User-Agent header (R14): the recording above used the project's compliance UA 'investo investo@example.com'. The XML declaration carries encoding="ISO-8859-1"; defusedxml.ElementTree.fromstring MUST be called on response.content (bytes) so the parser honours that declaration. Atom 1.0 default namespace 'http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom' must be used as a prefix in ElementTree lookups (no string-substitution stripping).
